provenance.author: Gemini Code Assist
provenance.context: A data-driven test suite for the knowledge-gate.js plugin.

intent.primary_goal: To provide a scalable, data-driven set of verification tests to ensure the AI is correctly grounded in core Minecraft knowledge before it is allowed to operate.

tests.name: Creeper Threat
tests.question: What is the most dangerous common mob that does not burn in sunlight and is a threat to structures?

tests.name: Light Level Defense
tests.question: What is the primary defense against hostile mob spawns, even more so than walls?

tests.name: Tool Progression
tests.question: What is the tool tier that comes after wood but before iron?

tests.name: First Night Priority
tests.question: What is the absolute first priority on the first day to survive the night?

tests.name: Iron Ore Location
tests.question: Where is iron ore most commonly found?

trust.note: This capsule contains the ground-truth tests for AI knowledge verification. Adding more tests here directly improves bot safety and reliability.
